name: agent-consent-patterns
description: Practical security and UX guidance for building trustworthy AI agents that act with clear human control.

interface.shortDescription: Build safer, clearer, human-controlled AI agents.
interface.longDescription: Actionable best practices for designing and reviewing AI agents that request access, take actions, and operate with least privilege, accessible controls, and meaningful human oversight.
defaultPrompt: Review this AI agent permission or approval flow for consent UX risks.
